official_functions.role: Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Construct, write, and decode the block_update packet body
Define the block position and block-state id body shape
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound block_update frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns block_update immediately after block_event.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the block_update id to ClientboundBlockUpdatePacket.
The official block_update body is block position via BlockPos.STREAM_CODEC and block state via ByteBufCodecs.idMapper(Block.BLOCK_STATE_REGISTRY).

The fixture uses the official public ClientboundBlockUpdatePacket(BlockPos, BlockState) constructor with built-in Blocks.STONE.defaultBlockState(), so it does not require initialized Level or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded block position, decoded block-state id, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove world/chunk state, block update semantics, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer world/chunk state, block update semantics, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
